notes:
### v1.1.13

#### Added
- Party Plan now separates owner and friend roles so member uploads no longer override the group owner's roster identity.
- Shared roster data is stored per Discord ID, with character inclusion tracked by group IDs so the same character data can be reused across multiple groups.
- Party Plan now supports Non-Static and Static group modes.
- Static raid assignments now reserve characters across groups and grey them out with a tooltip when another group tries to assign the same character to the same raid.
- Cross-group clear notes can now show clears with members from another group or with a named Static group.
- Encounter snapshots now include gate data, and partial multi-gate clears show as pending until all expected gates are complete.
- Active groups now show last updated information.

#### Improved
- Remote sync now checks a lightweight sheet status before loading full group data.
- Remote status now tracks separate timestamps for group configuration, roster data, assignments, snapshots, and related member groups.
- Upload/Update now saves locally first, reducing failed remote uploads from unsaved local changes.
- Remote sync errors are logged with clearer messages and truncated response bodies.
- Apps Script redirects are handled more reliably by the Tauri sync handler.
- Raid board count badges now show remaining possible group runs based on assigned characters per member and raid capacity.
- The active group toolbar, invite link area, tabs, delete button, raid lanes, badges, and runner lists were tightened for denser planning.
- Invite link controls are only shown to the owner, and non-invited users are told which owner to ask for access.

#### Changed
- Group controls are now owner-only, including friend management, group mode, planned raids, raid assignments, uploads of group-controlled changes, and deletion.
- Friend members can only manage and upload their own roster selection.
- Joining from an invite link now requires the owner to have added that Discord ID as a member first.
- RaidConfigSnapshots were removed from Party Plan sync and the Apps Script template.
- Raid board character notes no longer repeat planned-to-run text.

#### Fixed
- Owner detection now works after sync and reload when the UI shows the current user as Owner.
- Remote group merges now preserve each member's own characters, completions, and encounters while protecting owner-controlled fields.
- Characters newly reserved by a Static group are removed from stale raid-frame assignments in other groups and are not written back on the next save.
- Raid completion no longer marks a full raid complete after only one gate.
- Together-clear detection no longer labels solo owner data as a group clear.
- Delete controls are hidden for non-owners and styled as a compact red destructive action for owners.
- Apps Script GET requests now return JSON instead of a missing doGet HTML error page.
- Encounter-synced guardian clears now update the To Do tab and resolve against the current daily reset.
